data.body:
## Description

Modify tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh to add tests for config generation behavior in the onboarding SKILL.md.

### Tests to write (add at END of file, before print_summary):
- test_config_generation_section: Assert SKILL.md contains a config generation phase/section
- test_ticket_prefix_derivation: Assert SKILL.md mentions ticket prefix derivation from project name
- test_ci_workflow_examples: Assert SKILL.md mentions offering example workflows when none exist
- test_acli_auto_suggestion: Assert SKILL.md mentions ACLI_VERSION and ACLI_SHA256 auto-suggestion
- test_config_key_categories: Assert SKILL.md references dso-config.conf key categories (format, ci, commands, jira, design, tickets, merge, version, test)

### .test-index RED marker
Update the onboarding entry to add RED marker: [test_config_generation_section]

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh (modify)
- .test-index (modify — add RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes with RED-marked tests tolerated
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] At least 5 new config test functions exist
  Verify: grep -c 'test_config_\|test_ticket_prefix\|test_ci_workflow\|test_acli_' tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] .test-index has RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'onboarding/SKILL.md.*\[test_config' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
